notes: Solid, complete Asteroids implementation with proper splitting, saucer, particles, lives, levels, and high score — minor issue is holding Space fires only once per press instead of allowing rapid fire hold, and the win condition at level 6 feels abrupt, but overall a well-executed build.

An exceptionally well-crafted Asteroids clone with toroidal collision detection, proper saucer logic, safe respawn zones, and authentic wireframe visuals; only minor flaw is frame-rate dependent friction.

Solid and mostly complete Asteroids clone with working shooting, splitting, lives, and UFOs, but awkward control choices, pause/escape state quirks, and some gameplay roughness keep it well short of excellent.
